Short CV

Sedef Koç Bal completed her undergraduate education at Okan University, Department of Psychology in 2014, and graduated from the Department of Public Relations and Advertising with a double major progra.She graduated with honors and high honor degrees. In 2016, she graduated from Üsküdar University Clinical Psychology Master's Program with high honor degree and received her specialization.

During her education, she worked as an intern psychologist at Okan Educational Institutions, NPİSTANBUL Hospital Feneryolu Polyclinic and NPİSTANBUL Hospital AMATEM Clinic, and successfully completed her clinical internships.
